pr.title: Record: Complementary Training + Backoff N-gram Mixer — 0.4377 BPB

output.summary: Reproduced complementary training with BackoffNgramMixer on 8×L20Z, using legal score-first AdamW TTT, block freezing, and stride-128 eval to keep the model compact.
techniques: Bigram-weighted complementary loss to focus the neural model on hard tokens
BackoffNgramMixer (orders 2-10) with entropy-adaptive mixing during evaluation
Legal score-first AdamW TTT with frozen blocks and stride-128 evaluation
